3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5048.issue: [W5048] ".eslintignore" is most likely obsolete when using "@iobroker/eslint-config". Please remove it.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#347] "[iobroker-bot] Update Node.js versions in test-and-release workflow"](https://github.com/Ax-LED/ioBroker.powerfox2/issues/347)

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

0063.issue: [W0063] "mocha" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Ax-LED/ioBroker.powerfox2/blob/master/package.json)
